title: Plan My Trip
description: PlanMyTrip – A full-stack travel planning platform built with Spring Boot and MySQL, helping users organize trips, explore destinations, and manage travel plans through a secure and responsive interface.

title: Flowers Shopping web
description: Blossom Cart – A modern and responsive flower shopping website developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, designed to provide a seamless product exploration and shopping experience.

title: Recipe Finder Web App
description: Recipe Finder – A simple and interactive recipe discovery application that enables users to search for recipes and view cooking details through a clean and responsive web interface.
